howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From code to fame in 6 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Have a cool project? Share it with the community! Just add your GitHub repo or project URL.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our team briefly reviews your submission to ensure it's legit and safe for the community.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Spread the word! Share your project link with friends and followers to gather maximum vibes.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Community members vote on your project based on UI, UX, Innovation, and more.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Don't just watch! Support fellow developers by voting on their projects. Vibe is mutual.
howItWorks.step6Desc: Earn points, rise up the leaderboard, and get recognized as a top vibe creator!

seo.heroSubtitle: Community Platform to Promote & Grow Your Projects
seo.whatIsP1: Hyped.today is a free community-driven platform where creators, developers, and entrepreneurs promote their projects and get real engagement. Whether you launched a new SaaS, an open-source tool, or a side project, Hyped.today helps you get the visibility you deserve.
seo.whatIsP2: Unlike traditional promotion channels, Hyped.today uses community support to amplify your reach. Members support each other by liking, commenting, and sharing on LinkedIn, creating a mutual growth engine that benefits everyone.
seo.whatIsP3: With a gamified leaderboard, combo multipliers, and a growing community of makers, Hyped.today turns project promotion into a fun and rewarding experience.
seo.howStep1Desc: Add your project or LinkedIn post to the platform. Share what you're building and why it matters.
seo.howStep2Desc: Engage with other members' content by liking, commenting, and reposting on LinkedIn. Earn points for every action.
seo.howStep3Desc: Your points accumulate and rank you on the public leaderboard. Unlock combo multipliers for consecutive days of support.
seo.howListItem1: Like a community member's LinkedIn post
seo.howListItem2: Leave a thoughtful comment on a post
seo.howListItem3: Repost content to your LinkedIn network
seo.howListItem4: Maintain daily streaks for combo multipliers
seo.feature1Desc: Get genuine engagement from real people who care about your project. Our community actively supports and votes on new submissions.
seo.feature2Desc: Submit your LinkedIn posts for community support. Other members like, comment, and repost your content to increase its organic reach.
seo.feature3Desc: Earn points, build streaks, and unlock combo multipliers. The more you support others, the more visibility your projects get.
seo.feature4Desc: Compete with other creators and climb the rankings. Top supporters get recognized and featured across the platform.
seo.whoP1: Hyped.today is built for indie makers who want to launch their products to an engaged audience. If you've built something awesome but struggle with marketing, this platform gives you a head start.
seo.whoP2: Startup founders can use Hyped.today to generate early traction, gather feedback, and build a community around their product before and after launch.
seo.whoP3: LinkedIn creators and open-source developers benefit from guaranteed engagement on their posts and repositories, helping them grow their professional network organically.
seo.faq1A: Hyped.today is a free community-driven platform where creators, developers, and entrepreneurs promote their projects, get LinkedIn engagement, and climb a gamified leaderboard.
seo.faq2A: Yes, Hyped.today is completely free to use. You can submit projects, support others, and climb the leaderboard at no cost.
seo.faq3A: Hyped.today is for indie makers, startup founders, LinkedIn creators, open-source developers, and anyone who wants to promote their projects through community support.
seo.faq4Q: How does Hyped.today improve LinkedIn engagement?
seo.faq4A: Hyped.today lets you submit LinkedIn posts for community support. Other members like, comment, and repost your content, increasing its reach and engagement organically.
seo.faq5A: You earn points by supporting other members' posts (liking, commenting, reposting on LinkedIn). Points accumulate and rank you on the public leaderboard with combo multipliers.
